articles.title: Codex for (almost) everything
articles.description: The updated Codex app for macOS and Windows adds computer use, in-app browsing, image generation, memory, and plugins to accelerate developer workflows.

articles.title: Introducing GPT-Rosalind for life sciences research
articles.description: OpenAI introduces GPT-Rosalind, a frontier reasoning model built to accelerate drug discovery, genomics analysis, protein reasoning, and scientific research workflows.

articles.title: Accelerating the cyber defense ecosystem that protects us all
articles.description: Leading security firms and enterprises join OpenAI’s Trusted Access for Cyber, using GPT-5.4-Cyber and $10M in API grants to strengthen global cyber defense.

articles.title: The next evolution of the Agents SDK
articles.description: OpenAI updates the Agents SDK with native sandbox execution and a model-native harness, helping developers build secure, long-running agents across files and tools.

articles.title: Trusted access for the next era of cyber defense
articles.description: OpenAI expands its Trusted Access for Cyber program, introducing GPT-5.4-Cyber to vetted defenders and strengthening safeguards as AI cybersecurity capabilities advance.

articles.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: the next generation of expressive AI speech
articles.description: Our newest audio model introduces granular audio tags that give you precise control to direct AI speech for expressive audio generation.

articles.title: Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6: Powering real-world robotics tasks through enhanced embodied reasoning
articles.description: Gemini Robotics ER 1.6: Enhancing spatial reasoning and multi-view understanding for autonomous robotics.

articles.title: Gemma 4: Byte for byte, the most capable open models
articles.description: Gemma 4: Our most intelligent open models to date, purpose-built for advanced reasoning and agentic workflows.

articles.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
articles.description: Our latest voice model has improved precision and lower latency to make voice interactions more fluid, natural and precise.

articles.title: Protecting people from harmful manipulation
articles.description: Google DeepMind researches AI's harmful manipulation risks across areas like finance and health, leading to new safety measures.
